name: Mist Valley Soldier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>霞の谷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミスト・バレー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster that was not destroyed: Return that opponent's monster to the hand. You must control this face-up card to activate and to resolve this effect.
mnst_eff: At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster that was not destroyed: Return that opponent's monster to the hand. You must control this face-up card to activate and to resolve this effect.
eff: At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster that was not destroyed: Return that opponent's monster to the hand. You must control this face-up card to activate and to resolve this effect.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal Chronicle 1 - Chapter of Awakening

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Returns battling monster to hand after damage calculation
